positive: A symmetrical, minimalist line art illustration of interconnected deep-sea bioluminescent life forms and ancient geometric runes. Focus on the silhouette of stylized coral, manta rays, and ethereal kelp, rendered in a negative space aesthetic against a vibrant, deep indigo and sapphire gradient background. The composition should feel cyclical and harmonious, with strong contrast and clean, tattoo-style outlines. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality, print-ready for t-shirts.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, complex details, poorly drawn, anatomical errors, extra limbs, artifacts
